title: puyu
description: A mod that adds various gems, talents,and other features .enhances the infinite possibilities for players.
body:
A mod integrating features such as gems, talents, and growth systems, designed to enhance player capabilities.This mod offers players more possibilities to enhance various attributes, providing significant improvements and higher values compared to the vanilla game.The various types of monsters in the mod bring new challenges and opportunities to players.At the same time, it provides players with a different experience of ability enhancement.Monsters will feature a tier system, so players won’t lose the sense of challenge even after becoming stronger.When players grow tired of the relatively weak gameplay experience in the original version, they can try out this mod.

This mod will provide players with a variety of gems.Players can enhance the equipment in their off-hand by holding a gem in their main hand.

• Enhancement Stone
◦ Used to enhance weapons and equipment, increasing their base attack or defense. The higher the enhancement level, the lower the success rate.
◦ Has a chance to drop from killing Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, or Mythical monsters; higher rarity monsters drop more.
◦ Can be used to allocate points in the talent tree.

• Reforge Stone
◦ Resets or grants reforge attributes to equipment.
◦ Guaranteed drop from killing Epic or higher rarity monsters; 25% drop rate from killing Wither and Guardians.

• Luck Stone
◦ Doubles the success rate of enhancement.
◦ Guaranteed drop from killing Legendary and Mythical monsters.

• Lock Stone
◦ Locks one reforge attribute of equipment to prevent it from being replaced during reforge.
◦ Has a chance to drop from killing high-level monsters.

• Crushing Stone
◦ Used to decompose equipment and return a portion of the enhancement materials.
◦ craftable at the Crafting Table using a ring of Stone and Redstone.

• Breakthrough Stone
◦ Allows for two consecutive enhancement levels, but a failure has a 50% chance of destroying the weapon.Can be used to identify and upgrade Dungeon Stones.
◦ Has a chance to be obtained while enhancing equipment.

• Experience Tome
◦ Directly provides experience to equipment; higher equipment growth levels yield higher attack and armor.
◦ Craftable at the Crafting Table using a Bottle o' Enchanting and Paper.

• Dungeon Stone
◦Crafted with Diamonds and Nether Hearts in the Crafting Table.

•Golden Stone
◦Used to upgrade the Tier 2 Talent Tree.

• And more and more items will appear in game。
